## Meeting Purpose

[Bi-weekly all-hands meeting to introduce new hires, share company updates, and demo new product features.](https://fathom.video/share/TbNnj6PEkibsX--rbkf9kgqBxpsBEXr9?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Significant growth: GrowthX now at 62 employees with multiple new hires introduced](https://fathom.video/share/TbNnj6PEkibsX--rbkf9kgqBxpsBEXr9?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Strong business momentum: $1.5M in kickoffs in April, new partnerships (Udemy, Outreach.io)](https://fathom.video/share/TbNnj6PEkibsX--rbkf9kgqBxpsBEXr9?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)
  - [Product advancements: New image generation capabilities and improved fact-checking workflow](https://fathom.video/share/TbNnj6PEkibsX--rbkf9kgqBxpsBEXr9?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
  - [Promotions: Ada, Jess, Mariana, and Vivek promoted to senior managing editor roles](https://fathom.video/share/TbNnj6PEkibsX--rbkf9kgqBxpsBEXr9?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)

## Topics

### New Hire Introductions

  - [11 new team members introduced themselves, showcasing diverse backgrounds (content, design, engineering) and global locations (India, Philippines, Argentina, Uruguay, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/TbNnj6PEkibsX--rbkf9kgqBxpsBEXr9?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [Unique skills highlighted: martial arts, language proficiency, creative pursuits (poetry, music production)](https://fathom.video/share/TbNnj6PEkibsX--rbkf9kgqBxpsBEXr9?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)

### Company Updates

  - [Promotions announced for Ada, Jess, Mariana, and Vivek to senior managing editor](https://fathom.video/share/TbNnj6PEkibsX--rbkf9kgqBxpsBEXr9?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Notion documentation continuously improving; new hires encouraged to leverage video library](https://fathom.video/share/TbNnj6PEkibsX--rbkf9kgqBxpsBEXr9?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
  - [First board meeting held; commitment to transparency by sharing investor updates with entire team](https://fathom.video/share/TbNnj6PEkibsX--rbkf9kgqBxpsBEXr9?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

### Business Development

  - [Webinar success: 250+ comments requesting replay, driving organic interest](https://fathom.video/share/TbNnj6PEkibsX--rbkf9kgqBxpsBEXr9?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
  - [Strategic partnership discussions: Udemy (course transcription content), Outreach.io](https://fathom.video/share/TbNnj6PEkibsX--rbkf9kgqBxpsBEXr9?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [New clients: Flossom (DevOps for Salesforce) and AMBIT (identity/access management)](https://fathom.video/share/TbNnj6PEkibsX--rbkf9kgqBxpsBEXr9?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [April performance: Nearly $1.5M in project kickoffs](https://fathom.video/share/TbNnj6PEkibsX--rbkf9kgqBxpsBEXr9?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)
  - [Strategy shift: Focusing more on editorial as programmatic capabilities are built out](https://fathom.video/share/TbNnj6PEkibsX--rbkf9kgqBxpsBEXr9?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)

### Product Demo: Image Generation

  - [New tool combines Recraft for image generation with text overlay capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/TbNnj6PEkibsX--rbkf9kgqBxpsBEXr9?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
  - [Automates creation of section breakers, infographics, and quote sections](https://fathom.video/share/TbNnj6PEkibsX--rbkf9kgqBxpsBEXr9?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [Workflow analyzes article content to suggest illustration opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/TbNnj6PEkibsX--rbkf9kgqBxpsBEXr9?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
  - [Custom style adaptation (e.g., Zooplo's purple/neon cyberpunk aesthetic)](https://fathom.video/share/TbNnj6PEkibsX--rbkf9kgqBxpsBEXr9?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
  - [Exploring chart/graph generation from structured data](https://fathom.video/share/TbNnj6PEkibsX--rbkf9kgqBxpsBEXr9?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)

### Product Demo: Fact Checker

  - [Improved fact-checking workflow moved from Aero Ops to internal infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/TbNnj6PEkibsX--rbkf9kgqBxpsBEXr9?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
  - [Parses articles to identify statements, code snippets, and data for verification](https://fathom.video/share/TbNnj6PEkibsX--rbkf9kgqBxpsBEXr9?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)
  - [Uses Perplexity search engine to validate information](https://fathom.video/share/TbNnj6PEkibsX--rbkf9kgqBxpsBEXr9?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
  - [Provides detailed analysis, suggested corrections, and confidence scores](https://fathom.video/share/TbNnj6PEkibsX--rbkf9kgqBxpsBEXr9?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)
  - [Exploring domain-specific fact-checking (e.g., using Kappa.ai for technical documentation)](https://fathom.video/share/TbNnj6PEkibsX--rbkf9kgqBxpsBEXr9?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Explore chart/graph generation capabilities based on structured data input](https://fathom.video/share/TbNnj6PEkibsX--rbkf9kgqBxpsBEXr9?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)

  - [Onboard new engineering hires and focus on pressing programmatic SEO projects](https://fathom.video/share/TbNnj6PEkibsX--rbkf9kgqBxpsBEXr9?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
